metadata.title: Delete Your Account
metadata.description: How to delete your GainForest account, what data is removed, and what to do if you need help.

intro.p1: Your GainForest account is used across gainforest.app and the Taina Field mobile app. You can delete it yourself at any time, directly from the web app — deletion is immediate, permanent, and cannot be undone.

howTo.title: How to delete your account

steps.s2: Open your account settings at gainforest.app/settings.
steps.s3: Expand the "Advanced" section at the bottom of the page and find the "Danger zone".
steps.s4: Click "Delete account…". You'll see a summary of everything that will be removed.
steps.s5: Type the confirmation phrase and confirm. Your data is deleted immediately and you are signed out.

howTo.p1: There is no grace period or recovery window: once confirmed, deleted data cannot be restored.

paragraphs.p1: Every record GainForest has stored in your personal data repository is permanently removed: your GainForest profile, projects and sites, biodiversity observations, certs and collections, feed posts and likes, badges and signatures, audio and multimedia records, and your linked wallet records.

GainForest is built on the AT Protocol, where your identity and data repository belong to you — not to us. Deleting your GainForest account removes everything GainForest wrote to your repository, but your underlying AT Protocol identity (your handle and DID) and your login remain, as does data created by other apps.
paragraphs.p2: If you own organizations on GainForest, they are left without an owner — you'll be asked to acknowledge this before deletion runs.
paragraphs.p3: Data that Taina Field stores locally on your device stays on your device until you delete the app or its data.
paragraphs.p4: Because the AT Protocol is an open, federated network, copies of records you previously published may exist on servers operated by third parties. Deletion removes the records at the source and signals compliant services to remove their copies. See our privacy policy at gainforest.app/privacy for details.

help.title: Can't sign in, or need help?

paragraphs.p1: Email team@gainforest.net from the address associated with your account with the subject "Delete my account". We may need to verify your identity, and we'll handle your request within the timeframe required by applicable law. You can use the same address for any other request about your data.
